title: Umami Japanese Miso Soup
description: A light, savory miso soup bursting with umami flavors, enriched by tofu, seaweed, and mushrooms.

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: preferably shiro miso for a milder taste

instructions: 1. In a medium pot, bring 1 liter of water to a gentle boil.
2. Add the dashi granules and stir until fully dissolved.
3. Lower the heat to a simmer and add the sliced shiitake mushrooms; let them soften for 2 minutes.
4. Gently fold in the tofu cubes, taking care not to break them.
5. Reduce the heat to low and pour in the miso paste, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
6. Add the nori strips and let the soup heat through for an additional minute.
7. Drizzle with sesame oil, if using, and season with salt to taste.
8. Ladle the soup into bowls and top with sliced green onions.
9. Serve immediately while hot, and enjoy the rich umami experience.
